scripts.build: npx dotenv -e ../../packages/db/.env -- prisma generate --schema=../../packages/db/prisma/schema.prisma && npx esbuild ./src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --outfile=dist/index.js
scripts.dev: npx dotenv -e .env -e ../../packages/db/.env -- npx esbuild ./src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --outfile=dist/index.js && npx dotenv -e .env -e ../../packages/db/.env -- node dist/index.js
